text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin isn't looking well, so I<n>accompany
her to the infirmary.
Yeah, yeah. You worry too much.

I'm gonna snooze so leave me alone<n>and get
back to work.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Where am I?
Taishin... Taishiiiiin...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? Is that Ticket? She's usually<n>so much
louder...

text_block_list.name: Teensy Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin, Taishin, TAISHIIIIN! I'm down<n>heeeeere!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ticket?! Why are you so small?! You<n>look like a
grain of rice!

text_block_list.name: Pint-size Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Taishin! Watch where you're<n>stepping! I'd really
rather not be<n>squished.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You're tiny too, Hayahide?! What in<n>the world...
Pffhaha! You two're so cute!

So this is what it feels like to look<n>down on you
guys. Huh, not bad.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Want me to carry you around in my<n>pocket? It's
dangerous for you to run<n>around like that since
you're so<n>small.

text_block_list.name: Teensy Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yay! Thanks, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Pint-size Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sure... It's no biggie! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What was that dream just now?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh. My body feels so light.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: It seems Narita Taishin's back in tip<n>top shape!
What?! My body...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! Why am I getting bigger<n>and bigger?!

text_block_list.name: Teensy Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaaah! Taishin, Taishi... Tai...

What? What are you saying?! Did I<n>get too big to
hear them?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, come on! Why is this happening?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Aagh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yikes. That was a weird nightmare.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin's condition doesn't<n>improve at all...
